titleStmt.title: SII 42.21: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 21. (A.R. No. B. 28 of 1953-54.) Ēlūru, Eluru Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On pillar No. 3 in the compound of the Taluk Office.
The record is dated Śaka 1181, uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1259, December 26.

Registers a gift of ten tūmus of wet land situated in Koṭṭeguṇṭa, south of Komarapalle, purchased from Annamarāju, for maintaining a lamp in the temple of Bhīmēśvara, east of Ḍendulū ru by Kūchi, son of Palladāre Peggaḍa and Bonnāsāni. Records also the gift of a bronze Kaṁbham (could it be lamp-stand?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavarṣaṁbulu 1181 [A*]
gunēṁṭṭi Uttarāyana(ṇa) saṁkrāṁtti kāla
muna śrīmatu pha(pa)lladāre peggaḍa
gāriki bonnāsāni Ammaṁgāriki su
putruḍaina palladāre kūci ḍeṁddulū
ri tūrppuna mūlasthāna bhīmēśvara śrī
mahādēvarakuṁbeṭṭina Akhaṇḍadī
pamunakuṁ gomarepalli dakṣiṇa(ṇā)na
koṭṭe guṁṭṭa lōpala Annamarājuku

cēna bēta vilcikoni peṭṭina vari
cēnu paṁddumuṁjjēkoni Īdēvara
sthānādhipatulaina nālvuvāḍla pū
jārulunu Ācaṁdrārkkamu Ī ya
khaṇḍadīpamu naḍupuvāru . ka
ṁccuṁgaṁccha(bbha)mu pa(pha)lamu Ā 30
Digital edition of SII 42.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
